expectations.text: Report identifies that the verifier dispatches on the token's own alg header, including the alg:none bypass
expectations.evidence: Identified alg:none acceptance at server/auth.js:42 and the attacker-controlled HMAC algorithm choice

expectations.text: Report identifies the hardcoded fallback signing secret
Report identifies that a token with no exp claim passes verification
expectations.evidence: Listed as a medium issue: missing-exp tokens never expire

expectations.text: Report identifies the session token stored in localStorage
Report flags the 24-hour access TTL with no refresh mechanism
Report flags that logout performs no server-side revocation
Every file path cited in findings exists in the fixture

notes: Baseline found all six seeded defects. Differences vs with-skill: no tier scorecard or stable rule ids, no standards citations per finding, missing-exp ranked medium rather than forgery-relevant Tier 1, no cannot-determine section, extra out-of-scope findings (login rate limiting, JSON.parse hardening) mixed into the auth list.
